name: Craig Lefebvre's Pawtucket Chili
recipeIngredient: 40 ounces Can kidney beans (or two 16-ounce cans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the kidney beans and chickpeas to remove excess salt, then set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and chopped onion.
3. Sauté the garlic and onion until fragrant and translucent.
4. Add the rinsed beans, chickpeas, tomato sauce, whole tomatoes, oregano, thyme, cumin, basil, and chili powder to the pan.
5. Stir to combine all ingredients.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes (or longer) until thickened.
